title: Cronos Group Reports 2024 First Quarter Results
text: Cronos Group reported Q1 2024 net revenue of $25.3 million, up 30% year-over-year from $19.5 million in Q1 2023. The company reported net loss of $2.5 million compared to $18.0 million in prior year period. Gross profit improved to $4.5 million from $2.9 million with gross margin expanding to 18% from 15%. Cash and equivalents totaled $855.1 million, nearly double the $413.7 million held in Q1 2023. Canada operations revenue climbed 31% year-over-year to $18.9 million, driven by flower and extract sales growth. Israel market sales increased 27% year-over-year to $6.4 million following a challenging quarter with resilience in recovery. Spinach brand maintained number one flower brand position with 6.5% market share and third place in vapes with 7.6% share. Lord Jones hash-infused pre-rolls became market leader in their category following Q4 2023 relaunch. PEACE NATURALS expanded internationally with entry into United Kingdom in May 2024. Management reiterated target to reduce operating expenses by $5-$10 million in 2024 while maintaining expectations for positive net cash flow.
